item.title: Brennan Drizzle Promoted to Auditor of Ghostly Efficiency Amidst Ash-Cloud Celebration
item.description: New 4,200-soul quota promises longer afterlife layovers, adding flair to mandatory delays in transit.

item.title: Milford Declares War on Eggs and Milk: Local Farms Now Foreign Threats
item.description: Town Council's Decision Labels Produce as Imports, Farmers Retaliate with Sewage Fees

item.title: Bureau of Ox-Cart Affairs Celebrates New 50% Dignity Surcharge on Maple Syrup Imports
item.description: Thoughtful delays designed to enhance import pride and make waiting a virtue.

item.title: Pentagon Declares Total Victory After Accidentally Bombing Own Bases; 97-Year-Old Admirals Celebrate 'Employment Stabilization Success'
item.description: As double-shifts commence on the home front, officials toast to 'career extension opportunities' in the wake of airborne mishaps.

item.title: U.S. Customs Declares 50% Mutation Tariff on Canadian Songs a Musical Triumph
item.description: Agents celebrate reducing Ontario tunes, while local musicians brace for humming audits.

item.title: DMV Rolls Out Mandatory Star Ratings for Intergalactic Sketch Services Amid Junk Plague
item.description: Consumers now required to rate their charcoal ID sketchers while fighting for their lives—literally.

item.title: Milk Shortage Leaves Nation Pickled: Salting Experts Call for Pickled Solutions
item.description: National Pickle Registry Teams with Congress to Address the Critical 'Curdling Crisis' Amidst Tariff-Driven Ice Block Dilemma.

item.title: Federal Apocalypse Amenities Commission Rates Society's Collapse: 2.5 Stars for Greater Famine, Lower Morale
item.description: Consumers Bemoan Tariff-Driven Shortages While Rating Survival Cheese as 'Moderately Edible'

item.title: Commuters Schedule Afterlife Delays as Soulbound Express Names New Auditor of Ghostly Efficiency
item.description: Brennan Drizzle’s promotion rewards stalled souls with guaranteed ash-cloud transit credits.

item.title: HEROIC COLLECTIVE SUBMITS 312 NEW PICKET-FENCE ALIGNMENT SUBCOMMITTEES TO MEET CEASEFIRE QUOTA AFTER DIRECTORATE LOSS
item.description: Ninth Directorate's disbandment proves fertile ground for bureaucratic expansion; citizens cheer as resolution minutes pile higher than chimneys.
